title: Training Composer 2
summary: Cursor's Composer 2 is built on Kimi K2.5 (1T parameters, 32B active, 256K context) with coding-focused continued pre-training and long-horizon reinforcement learning. Training uses auto-install bootstrapping, nonlinear length penalties, and self-summarization for reward shaping. Cursor Bench, an internal evaluation on real engineer queries, separates model quality more cleanly than SWE-bench.
